top_signals.title: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
top_signals.summary: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New World, Ares Cut Hong Kong Office Tower Unit Prices Up to 57%
top_signals.summary: A commercial complex in an industrial neighborhood of Hong Kong has become the latest flashpoint in a commercial property market struggling with pockets of weakness, even as the broader real estate market rebounds.

top_signals.title: Oil Tanker Earnings Plunge by $200,000 as More Return to Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Tanker Earnings Plunge by $200,000 as More Return to Hormuz  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
top_signals.summary: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

top_signals.title: South Korean president to unveil massive AI and chip investment drive
top_signals.summary: The announcement would mark Lee Jae Myung's boldest ‌push yet ‌to align South Korea's AI and chip ambitions with his pledge to the country's narrow ​regional disparities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
